items.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
items.summary: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords.

items.title: Houthis claim attack on oil tankers as US launches more strikes on Iran
items.summary: The Houthi attacks would be the first in the Red Sea since the Iran-backed group announced a "maritime embargo" against Saudi Arabia.

items.title: France evacuates 20,000 as wildfires spread in south-west
items.summary: Most of those evacuated were tourists from campsites around Arcachon Bay in France's Gironde region.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 日本熊本超商搶案 男子持刀拒捕遭警方開槍擊傷
items.summary: 日本熊本縣昨日晚間發生一起超商持刀搶劫案。一名21歲男子持刀闖入合志市一間全家便利商店企圖搶劫，警方獲報後火速趕往現場，開槍擊中對方，嫌犯中彈受傷送醫，目前生命跡象穩定，全案已由...…

items.title: 怕了烏克蘭無人機突襲 俄國最大進出口港夜間禁航
items.summary: 受烏克蘭無人機頻頻打擊境內重要設施影響，俄羅斯臨黑海的諾沃羅西斯克港（Novorossiysk）暫時禁止船舶在深夜進出，另外，俄國也加強對亞速海、克赤海峽航運的限制。  路...…

items.title: 美沙核能協議有前提  川普：取決於沙以關係正常化
items.summary: 美國22日宣布和沙烏地阿拉伯達成協議，將向沙國提供核能技術。美沙民用核能合作，升高中東核擴散和軍備競賽的疑慮。美國總統川普23日表示，這項協議不涉及濃縮鈾，而且「完全取決於」沙...…
